message:
🐛 Fix single-page fetch in issue-only contributor discovery (#1267)

The issue-only contributor discovery in generate-leaderboard.mjs only
fetched page 1 of the GitHub Search API results (max 100 items per page),
missing contributors whose issues appeared on later pages.

Added pagination matching the existing searchItems() pattern — loops up
to SEARCH_MAX_PAGES, respecting rate limits, and stops when all results
are fetched or a partial page is returned.

Fixes #1266

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
